# Smart Search 0.3.2

Smart Search 0.3.2 is a stable patch release for Zhipu MCP ZRead response normalization.

## Fixes

- Treats quoted ZRead tool-execution errors such as service code `1015` as failed provider responses instead of successful empty results.
- Preserves the provider's detailed tool error while returning the stable `provider_error` category when the service code has no documented public meaning.
- Removes JSON string wrapper quotes from URLs extracted from successful ZRead content.

## Verification

- Added focused coverage for quoted tool errors, failed response envelopes, and URL extraction.
- Verified both an invalid-directory response and a successful repository-tree response against the live ZRead MCP endpoint.
- Rechecked the live `search_doc`, `get_repo_structure`, and `read_file` schemas through a read-only `tools/list` call.

Provider behavior was checked on 2026-07-23 against the official [ZRead MCP documentation](https://docs.bigmodel.cn/cn/coding-plan/mcp/zread-mcp-server) and [Coding Plan MCP overview](https://docs.bigmodel.cn/cn/coding-plan/mcp).

## Install or update

```bash
npm install -g @shirlytaylor73/smart-search@latest
smart-search --version
```
